Fix code review warnings (WR-01 through WR-06)

blockers.description: TuiController.getSize() returns height=Infinity in Bun — TUI crashes on launch
blockers.workaround: Port amp's Uk0() + updateTerminalSize() 4-layer defense from amp-cli-reversed/framework/tui-layout-engine.js:413-426

blockers.description: TuiController.cleanup() is sync but calls async deinit() — terminal left in raw mode on SIGINT
blockers.workaround: Port amp's async signal handler pattern

human_actions_pending.action: Verify TUI renders in real terminal after getSize() fix
human_actions_pending.context: No human has ever seen the TUI render successfully

decisions.decision: Added CLAUDE.md mandatory rule: all implementation must cross-reference amp-cli-reversed/ source
decisions.rationale: Phase 12.1 agents wrote naive implementations without consulting reference code, producing Infinity bug and other issues

decisions.decision: Added CLAUDE.md mandatory rule: integration verification before completion
decisions.rationale: 100+ unit tests passed but TUI never actually launched

next_action: Fix TuiController.getSize() by porting amp's Uk0() from amp-cli-reversed/framework/tui-layout-engine.js:413-426, then verify TUI launches in real terminal
context_notes: Phase 12.1 plans are all marked complete but TUI does not actually launch. Root cause: getSize() returns Infinity because it uses ?? instead of amp's 4-layer defense. Secondary issues: async cleanup races (CR-01/CR-02), missing prop forwarding (fixed). CLAUDE.md created with mandatory amp cross-reference rule.
